summary: Completed frontend testing of view mode and sorting features on Customers, Suppliers, and Products pages. All features working correctly.

passed_tests.details: Grid view shows customer cards, List view shows table with columns (Name, Phone, Type, Total Purchases, Balance, Last Visit, Actions). Toggle buttons work correctly.
Sort dropdown has 4 options: الاسم (Name), الرصيد (Balance), المشتريات (Purchases), التاريخ (Date). All options selectable.
Ascending/Descending button toggles correctly. Data reorders properly based on selected sort field.
Grid view shows supplier cards with advance payment button. List view shows table with columns (Name, Phone, Email, Total Purchases, Balance, Advance Balance, Actions).
Sort dropdown has 4 options: الاسم (Name), الرصيد (Balance), المشتريات (Purchases), الرصيد المتقدم (Advance Balance). All options work correctly.
3 view modes: Grid (large cards with full details), List (horizontal rows), Compact (small tiles). All 3 buttons toggle views correctly.
Sort dropdown has 4 options: الاسم (Name), السعر (Price), المخزون (Stock), سعر الشراء (Purchase Price). All options selectable and affect display order.
View modes are saved to localStorage (customersViewMode, suppliersViewMode, productsViewMode) and persist across page reloads.

context_for_next_testing_agent: View modes and sorting features fully implemented on all 3 main pages. Customers page has Grid/List views with sort by name/balance/purchases/date. Suppliers page has Grid/List views with sort by name/balance/purchases/advance_balance. Products page has Grid/List/Compact views with sort by name/price/stock/purchase_price. All view modes persist to localStorage.
screenshots_taken: customers_dropdown_open.png - Sort dropdown showing all options
